title: Music Interface
description: A modern in-game music player for Minecraft with playlists, favorites, album covers and full control over custom music libraries.
body:
# Music Interface

Music Interface is a modern in-game music player for Minecraft that lets players manage custom music in a clean, immersive interface.

Browse tracks, view covers, create playlists, mark favorites, and control your music without leaving the game.

## Features

*   Modern in-game music player
*   Open the GUI with `K` by default
*   Quick access from the title screen and pause menu
*   Custom music library support
*   Album cover display
*   Search system
*   Favorites
*   Playlists
*   Random and ordered playback
*   Playback history
*   Grid and list views
*   Configurable Now Playing toast
*   Advanced playback settings
*   Vanilla music compatibility options
*   Track disabling and filtering
*   Uses Minecraft's native Music volume slider
*   Template pack generation for custom music packs
*   Cobblemon-friendly support

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1481143/description_b9785b53-48ec-40d3-8adb-7d9c776a2995.png)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1481143/description_042ab203-1f92-46c2-b46c-4153ae7c9b11.png)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1481143/description_9e5687bb-7284-47a5-86dc-4c8b81a0f53b.png)

## Custom Music Support

Music Interface lets players and modpack creators build fully custom music libraries for Minecraft.

Supported content includes:

*   Audio files
*   Album covers
*   Track title
*   Artist name
*   Album name

The mod also includes a template system to help create and organize custom music packs more easily.

## Feedback

Feedback, suggestions, and bug reports are welcome.

Discord: [Our Story Network](https://discord.gg/kb8NSTF45n)  
Patreon: [Our Story Collection](https://www.patreon.com/c/OurStoryCollection)

## License

This mod may be used freely in public or private modpacks.

You may also create and distribute resource packs, music packs, or other content made for Music Interface.

Please do not reupload the mod itself or claim the project as your own. When possible, link to the official project page.
